title: Memory leak in HW Aggregate to Comb conversion
body:
**Test commit**
[417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8](https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8)

**Description**
The `-hw-aggregate-to-comb` pass in circt-opt triggers a memory leak when processing `esi.wrap.fifo` (and `esi.wrap.vr`) operations.

**Steps to reproduce**
- Minimal MLIR program (test.mlir)
```
"builtin.module"() ({
  "hw.module"() <{module_type = !hw.modty<>, parameters = [], sym_name = "TestDanglingFIFO"}> ({
    %0 = "hw.constant"() <{value = false}> : () -> i1
    %1:2 = "esi.wrap.fifo"(%0, %0) : (i1, i1) -> (!esi.channel<i1, FIFO>, i1)
    "hw.output"() : () -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
}) : () -> ()
```

**Command**
```
circt-opt -hw-aggregate-to-comb test.mlir
```

**Output**
```
module {
  hw.module @TestDanglingFIFO() {
    %false = hw.constant false
    %false_0 = hw.constant false
    hw.output
  }
}


=================================================================
==108046==ERROR: LeakSanitizer: detected memory leaks

Direct leak of 80 byte(s) in 1 object(s) allocated from:
    #0 0x5639e96e1c5e in malloc (/workdir/builds/circt/bin/circt-opt+0x6f95c5e) (BuildId: d0273fc7523026d0)
    #1 0x5639ef78e52a in mlir::Operation::create(mlir::Location, mlir::OperationName, mlir::TypeRange, mlir::ValueRange, mlir::DictionaryAttr, mlir::OpaqueProperties, mlir::BlockRange, unsigned int) /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/IR/Operation.cpp:114:46

SUMMARY: AddressSanitizer: 80 byte(s) leaked in 1 allocation(s).
```
